note: U-NEXT (hol0002587_株式会社RIVERSE御中_YYYYMM.xlsx). Row-level rules reverse-engineered from raw 202603 vs GT 202604 (30 rows).
observations: 『コンテンツ明細』 has one row per episode/content unit (~2207 rows in 202603).
『タイトル一覧』 has one row per 作品 and matches GT 1:1 (30 rows).
『ヘッダー』 『集計対象期間』 yields sales_month (e.g. 2026/03/01-2026/03/31 → 2026-03-01).
料率 is constant 0.4 across every detail row (default_rs).
Titles match GT verbatim — no tilde / fullwidth normalization needed.
All 30 GT rows are type=WT, distribution_strategy=non-ex, channel=u-next, fee_jpy=0, withholding_tax_jpy=0.
